items.title: Recapping Argentina's Run To The 2026 World Cup Final
items.summary: After surviving close calls and pulling off improbable comebacks, let's take a look back at Argentina's historic run to the World Cup final.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Iheanacho rejects new Celtic deal as Saracchi gives up on return
items.summary: Nigeria striker Kelechi Iheanacho turns down a new contract with Celtic and joins Bursaspor as former loanee Marcelo Saracchi admits defeat in his bid to return to the Scottish...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: The Blaze thump Durham by 10 wickets to win T20 Blast
items.summary: Former England international Tammy Beaumont makes an unbeaten half-century as The Blaze beat Durham to lift the Women's T20 Blast title.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
